title: Chips Lead Nasdaq 100 Rebound, Oracle Sinks 11%: Stock Market Today
author: Piero Cingari
description: The Nasdaq 100 rose 1.1% on Thursday, led by semiconductor equipment makers rallying on positive analyst upgrades and AI data-center demand outlook. However, Oracle plunged 11.6% despite record earnings, citing a $40 billion financing plan and 162% increase in capital spending for AI infrastructure. Software stocks broadly declined while small caps and chip-related equities outperformed.

title: Digital Twin Market Expected to Reach US$ 140 Billion by 2031
author: The Insight Partners
description: The global digital twin market, valued at $13.74 billion in 2024, is expected to grow at a 40.1% CAGR to reach $140.94 billion by 2031. Growth is driven by increasing IoT adoption, Industry 4.0 implementation, and enterprise focus on predictive maintenance. North America leads with 35% market share, while Asia Pacific is the fastest-growing region. Large enterprises and healthcare sectors show the strongest adoption rates.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Identified as a major cloud and AI provider offering Azure Digital Twins platform; recent development with Kyndryl announced in April 2026 for AI-powered workplace digital twin solutions
Leading provider of virtual twin experiences through 3DEXPERIENCE platform for aerospace, automotive, and life sciences sectors

title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Could Be the Catalyst That Lifts These Undervalued Tech Stocks
author: Lee Samaha
description: The article highlights three undervalued tech stocks that could benefit from AI integration: PTC, Trimble, and ON Semiconductor. These companies are leveraging AI to enhance their industrial, construction, and semiconductor solutions, offering potential growth opportunities for investors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Trading at attractive valuation, growing recurring revenue, embedding AI into solutions, and improving digital analysis capabilities for manufacturing processes
Growing recurring revenue, potential AI-driven workflow improvements, connecting physical and digital solutions in construction and transportation sectors
Low valuation, potential growth in EV and industrial automation markets, crucial sensors for advanced systems, and partnership with Nvidia for next-generation AI data centers

title: PTC (PTC) Q3 Revenue Jumps 24%
author: Jesterai
description: PTC delivered strong Q3 FY2025 financial results, surpassing revenue and earnings expectations. The company raised full-year guidance, demonstrated significant margin expansion, and continued strategic investments in AI and product development across multiple industry verticals.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Exceeded financial expectations with 24% year-over-year revenue growth, improved operating margin from 18.5% to 32.6%, raised full-year guidance, and demonstrated strong recurring revenue and strategic product investments in AI and industry-specific solutions

title: Forget a Takeover From Autodesk, PTC Is a Great Stock to Buy Anyway. Here's Why.
author: Lee Samaha
description: PTC remains an attractive stock amid potential acquisition speculation in the industrial software sector, with ongoing consolidation and digital technology transformation driving market interest.
